summary: Validated new SUM badges on /admin/students 'Indicadores da Rede' for school 'Escola Teste Multisseriada'. All 4 new badges render with correct testids, correct labels and correct values matching backend series_counts. EJA badge is correctly positioned between '4ª Etapa' and 'Regular'. Consistency checks against individual series badges all match.
critical_code_review_comments: sumSeries helper (StudentsComplete.js ~L1469) is simple and correct (handles UPPERCASE keys via toUpperCase()). Good DRY usage.

EJA inclusion inside the modalidades map with isSum flag keeps render logic consistent; minor: 'EJA' visually sits inside 'Etapas (EJA) e Modalidades' which already says 'EJA' in the title — acceptable since spec required this exact placement.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing school 220d4022-ec5e-4fb6-86fc-9233112b87b2 ('Escola Teste Multisseriada') with backend series_counts={'2º ANO':1,'6º ANO':3}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route: /admin/students. After login, app lands on /dashboard (not /admin/**) — navigate explicitly to /admin/students. School filter is a native <select> (1st of 3 selects on page). 'Indicadores da Rede' accordion is collapsed by default and only loads after a school is selected. data-testids verified: sum-educacao-infantil, sum-anos-iniciais, sum-anos-finais, sum-eja. Pre-existing console 401 on /api/config/* is unrelated to this feature.

verification_results.eja_position: Order in modalidade-counts: 1ª Etapa, 2ª Etapa, 3ª Etapa, 4ª Etapa, EJA, Regular, Integral, AEE, Recomp. — EJA correctly between '4ª Etapa' and 'Regular' PASS
